& Suites
359 High St
New Shoreham, RI

Stay

Twenty-three rooms blending Victorian charm with modern luxury.

Newly remodeled, each room individually decorated with a blend of modern and vintage furniture. Located on the second and third floors, all accommodations are accessible by stairs only. Each room features luxury linens, premier bath products, and a private en-suite bath.

Filter
5 photos
Queen · Sleeps 2

Island View Queen

Peaceful and well-appointed — a charming stay for all travelers. Vintage design refined with modern amenities, an award-winning Helix Mattress, luxury linens, and a private en-suite bath.

Book This Room
5 photos
King · Sleeps 2

Ocean View King

Wake up to water. Striking views of the ocean, green fields, town, and Clayhead — paired with vintage design, modern amenities, and a private en-suite bath.

Book This Room
5 photos
Full · Sleeps 2

Cozy Room

Just the right size. While petite, our Cozy room is perfect for the Block Island adventurer — a full-size bed, private bath, and a great place to drop your bags and explore.

Book This Room
5 photos
2 Bedrooms · Sleeps 4–5

Cozy Family Suite

Bring the whole family. A spacious two-bedroom retreat with fun bunk beds and a touch of luxury throughout — air conditioning, Helix mattresses, plush linens, and premium bath amenities.

Book This Room
5 photos
Queen + Sofa · Sleeps 3

Studio Suite

A flexible studio layout with a queen bed and sleeper sofa — designed for couples or small families who want room to spread out without sacrificing comfort or design.

Book This Room
5 photos
2 Bedrooms · Sleeps 6

Veranda Suite

A two-bedroom suite on the lower level of our adjacent annex, with a small kitchen and a stunning wrap-around veranda overlooking green hills, Clayhead, and the ocean.

Book This Room
5 photos
2 Bedrooms · Sleeps 6–8

Penthouse Suite

Our premiere offering — a two-bedroom suite with a separate living area, private bath, full kitchen, and a custom oak bar. The most discerning stay on Block Island.

Book This Room
Beyond the Inn

A four-bedroom estate, just down the hill.

The Manor is our standalone oceanview residence — perfect for families, retreats, and groups looking for a private home with the service of an inn. 4 bedrooms, 4.5 baths, a chef's kitchen, and a four-minute walk to the beach.

Explore The Manor
A peaceful setting just outside everything.

A modern oceanside escape, perched atop the highest point of Old Harbor on Block Island.
